Simple, Transparent Pricing

One service. Two plans. Zero surprises.

Always Included

Consultations are always free.

Reach out and we'll tailor a plan to fit your bar's needs. Get your bar ready, on your terms.

Schedule a Free Consultation
Monthly Plan
$350 /month

One Mock Health and Safety Inspection per month for a single bar location.

  • ✓ One inspection per month
  • ✓ Single bar location
  • ✓ Inspection Results Report
  • ✓ Email delivery in 1–2 business days
Get Started
Best Value
Annual Plan
$3,900 one-time

Full year of Mock Health and Safety Inspections. One upfront payment, maximum peace of mind.

  • ✓ 12 inspections per year
  • ✓ Single bar location
  • ✓ Inspection Results Reports
  • ✓ Save $300 vs monthly
Get Started

Not sure which plan is right for you?

Every bar is different. We're happy to talk through your situation and recommend the best fit. Reach out — consultations are always free.

Contact us →

Get your Bar Ready!

Bar Ready LV performs Mock Health and Safety Inspections for bars and restaurants in Las Vegas, Nevada — helping establishments identify and correct compliance issues before a real inspector does.
